title: indigofera langlassei
intro: Indigofera langlassei, also known as the Philippine indigo plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to the Philippines. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Indigofera langlassei include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into tea, infused in oil, or used in topical creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
